footer.tagline: Automate your reviews with AI and WhatsApp.

home.badge: Automate your reviews — on any platform
home.heroTitle: Get more <stars>5★</stars> reviews automatically via WhatsApp
home.heroDesc: Send automated WhatsApp messages to your customers, analyse their feedback with AI, and direct satisfied customers to leave a review where it matters most. For any business or service.
home.noCard: No credit card · Set up in 1 minute
home.howDesc: No extra apps. No technical hassle. Just enter the number and the system does the rest.
home.step1Desc: In the dashboard, enter the name and phone number of the customer who just made a purchase or used your service. You can also import a CSV list.
home.step2Desc: The customer receives a personalised WhatsApp. Claude analyses the reply and detects whether it is positive, negative, or neutral.
home.step3Desc: Satisfied customers are automatically directed to leave a review. Unhappy customers are filtered before reaching public platforms.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your reputation
home.featuresDesc: A tool built for real businesses that want real results.
home.f1Desc: Send personalised messages with the customer's name. Open rates of 98% vs 20% for email.
home.f2Desc: Claude analyses every reply. Unsatisfied customers receive an empathetic message — no public exposure.
home.f3Desc: Google Maps, App Store, Play Store, Trustpilot, TripAdvisor, and any custom URL.
home.f4Desc: View your requests, response rates, and customer sentiment in a clean panel.
home.f5Desc: Have a customer list? Import hundreds of contacts in seconds with our Excel/CSV importer.
home.f6Desc: Generate a custom poster with a QR code to request reviews at the counter or in your physical location.
home.platformsDesc: Connect where your potential customers are.
home.casesDesc: Businesses already multiplying their reviews with ReseñasYa.
home.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of businesses already automating their reviews. Set up in under 1 minute.
home.ctaBtn: Create free account — no credit card
home.conversationSubtitle: Fully automated, personalized and valid for any review platform
home.testimonialsSubtitle: What businesses say after weeks of generating reviews with ReseñasYa
home.convPositiveMsg1: Hi Maria! This is the team at Sunshine Café. How was your experience today? 😊
home.convPositiveMsg2: Really great! The coffee was delicious and the staff super friendly 😍
home.convPositiveMsg3: So glad to hear that, Maria! 🙌 Would you mind sharing your experience on Google Maps? 👉 maps.google.com/...
home.convPositiveFooter: ✓ Customer directed to the review platform
home.convNegativeMsg1: Hi Carlos! This is the team at Sunshine Café. How was your experience today? 😊
home.convNegativeMsg2: Honestly not great, it took too long and my order arrived cold...
home.convNegativeMsg3: Thank you for your honesty, Carlos. We're sorry it wasn't up to expectations 😔 Your feedback helps us improve. We hope to see you again soon! 🙏
home.convNegativeFooter: ✓ Feedback received privately, no damage to reputation
home.convIncentiveMsg1: Hi Sara! I'm from Style Barbershop. How was your visit? 😊
home.convIncentiveMsg2: Loved it! Really happy with my haircut 🥰
home.convIncentiveMsg3: Amazing Sara! 🌟 Leave a 5★ review and send us a screenshot → 20% off your next visit. 👉 maps.google.com/...
home.convIncentiveMsg5: ✅ Verified! Your 20% discount is reserved. See you soon! 🎉
home.convIncentiveFooter: ✓ AI verifies the 5★ before sending the reward
home.convEcomMsg2: Wow, so fast! 😍 Thank you so much 🙌
home.howSubtitle: 4 steps to get more reviews on Google Maps, Trustpilot, App Store and more
home.sectorsSubtitle: If you have customers and want more reviews on Google, App Store, Play Store, Trustpilot… ReseñasYa is for you

configuracion.platformsDesc: Add the URLs where you want to receive reviews
configuracion.linkHelpStep1: → Open Google Maps on your phone or computer
configuracion.linkHelpStep2: → Search for your business and tap on it

configuracion.shortCodePending: The short link will be generated on save.
configuracion.noLinkHint: Enter the link so your customers can leave their review.
configuracion.sharedModeWarning: With a shared number the message text is not customisable. A fixed Meta-approved template is used. To use your own text you need a dedicated number.

configuracion.sharedPreviewMsg: Hi María! I'm from the {name} team. How was your experience with us? Your feedback helps us improve 😊
configuracion.welcomePlaceholder: Write the message or use the ✨ button to generate it with AI
configuracion.remindersDesc: If the customer doesn't reply, a reminder WhatsApp is sent automatically
configuracion.reminders2Desc: The next day and 3 days later, at 10am
configuracion.remindersBillingNote: Each reminder counts as an additional send for billing purposes.
configuracion.whatsappDesc: Choose which number sends messages to your customers
configuracion.sharedDesc: Messages are sent from the platform's number. No setup required — works from the first moment.
configuracion.ownDesc: Messages are sent from your company number. Customers see your brand, not ReseñasYa.
configuracion.setupGuideTitle: 📋 How to connect your number — step by step
configuracion.setupStep1: Create a Twilio account — twilio.com (free to start).
configuracion.setupStep2: Enable WhatsApp Business — in Twilio Console go to Messaging → Senders → WhatsApp Senders and click «Add Sender».
configuracion.setupStep3: Connect your number — Twilio will guide you through Meta's (WhatsApp) verification process. You'll need a Meta Business account. The process takes 1–3 business days.
configuracion.setupStep4: Copy your credentials — from the Twilio Console home screen, copy the Account SID and Auth Token and enter them above.
configuracion.setupStep5: Set up the webhook — in Twilio Console go to your WhatsApp number and under «When a message comes in» enter this URL:
configuracion.dedicatedDesc: We assign you an exclusive number for your business. We handle everything: setup, maintenance and Meta support.
configuracion.dedicatedContact: We'll get in touch with you as soon as this option is available.
configuracion.errorInit: Could not initialise the business profile. Please reload the page.
configuracion.errorConnection: Connection error loading settings. Please reload the page.
configuracion.errorGenerateMsg: Could not generate the message automatically. You can write it manually.
configuracion.errorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

configuracion.toneUstedExample: Would you be kind enough to leave us a review...?
configuracion.toneJuvenilExample: Could you help us out by leaving a review...?

Please review each platform's Terms of Service before enabling it.

cookies.metaDesc: Information about the use of cookies on ReseñasYa in accordance with European regulations.
cookies.managePrefsPrompt: Want to review or change your preferences?
cookies.s1p1: A cookie is a small text file that a website saves on your browser when you visit it. Cookies allow the website to remember your actions and preferences (such as login, language, or font size) over a period of time, so you don't have to keep re-entering them whenever you visit the site or navigate from one page to another.
cookies.s1p2: In accordance with the EU ePrivacy Directive (2009/136/EC) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) 2016/679, informs you about the use of cookies on the ReseñasYa platform.
cookies.s2_1p1: These are essential for the platform to function. Without them, services such as authentication or session security would not be possible. They do not require prior consent under applicable regulations and cannot be deactivated.
cookies.s2_2p1: They help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it. Data is processed in an aggregate and anonymous manner. They are only activated with your express consent.
cookies.s2_2p2: These cookies are not currently active. They will be activated in a future platform update, at which point you will be informed via the consent banner.
cookies.s2_3p1: They allow relevant advertising to be displayed and campaign performance to be measured on social platforms. They are only activated with your express consent.
cookies.s2_3p2: These cookies are not currently active. They will be activated in a future update.
cookies.s3p1: The following services are part of our platform but operate exclusively on the server and do not install cookies in your browser:
cookies.s3l1: Twilio WhatsApp Business — Sending and receiving WhatsApp messages to customers.
cookies.s3l2: Anthropic Claude — AI-powered sentiment analysis of customer responses.
cookies.s3l3: Supabase PostgreSQL — Database. Session credentials are managed via the first-party cookies described above.
cookies.s3p2: If you access external links on the platform (such as your Google Maps profile), the destination sites may set their own cookies according to their policies. <company/> does not control or take responsibility for such cookies.
cookies.s4l1Desc: Strictly necessary cookies for the service to function (authentication, security) do not require prior consent.
cookies.s4l2Desc: Analytical and marketing cookies require your prior, free, informed, and specific consent. You can withdraw your consent at any time from the preferences panel.
cookies.s5p1: You can review or change your preferences at any time using the button at the top of this page or from the platform footer.
cookies.s5p2: You can also manage, block, or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling necessary cookies may prevent the platform from functioning correctly.
cookies.s6p1: <company/> may update this Cookie Policy when necessary, for example when incorporating new features that require the use of additional cookies or when contracting new services. Substantial updates will be communicated via the consent banner and, where appropriate, by email.
cookies.s6p2: For any queries about cookies or privacy, contact us at:
cookies.c_sbAccess_purpose: Management of the user's authenticated session on the platform.
cookies.c_sbRefresh_purpose: Automatic renewal of the user session.
cookies.c_csrf_purpose: Protection against CSRF attacks (Cross-Site Request Forgery).
cookies.c_ryConsent_purpose: Stores your cookie consent preferences so you don't have to set them on every visit.
cookies.c_ryCountry_purpose: Remembers the country prefix selected in the phone number selector.
cookies.c_ga_purpose: Anonymously measures browsing behaviour to improve the user experience.
cookies.c_va_purpose: Web performance analytics without cross-site tracking cookies.
cookies.c_fbp_purpose: Conversion tracking and remarketing on Meta platforms.
cookies.c_gcl_purpose: Measuring conversion performance for Google campaigns.

cookieCategories.necessaryDesc: Essential for the platform to work. Without them, logging in or securing your account is not possible.
cookieCategories.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it. Data is processed in aggregate and anonymously.
cookieCategories.marketingDesc: Allow relevant advertising to be shown and campaign performance to be measured on social platforms.

privacy.metaDesc: Privacy policy, legal notice and data protection of ReseñasYa in accordance with GDPR.
privacy.s1Title: 1. Identifying information of the data controller
privacy.s1_trademarkV: Buy & Click (Spanish Patent and Trademark Office)
privacy.s1_activityV: SaaS services for online reputation management
privacy.s1p1: In compliance with current applicable legislation regarding information society services, the identifying information of the platform's owner is made available to users.
privacy.s2p1: This legal notice governs access to and use of the ReseñasYa platform ({appUrl}), owned by {company}. Accessing the platform implies full acceptance of this legal notice. If you do not agree with its terms, you must refrain from using the service.
privacy.s3p1: All content on the platform — including, without limitation, texts, photographs, graphics, images, icons, technology, software, source code, logos, trademarks, trade names, graphic design and structure — is owned by {company} or its content providers, and is protected by Spanish and international intellectual and industrial property regulations.
privacy.s3p2: The reproduction, distribution, public communication, transformation or any other form of exploitation of such content without the express written authorisation of {company} is expressly prohibited.
privacy.s4p1: {company} does not guarantee the continuous availability or error-free operation of the platform. Nor is it liable for damages that may arise from incorrect use of the platform, service interruptions, technical failures or unauthorised access not attributable to {company}.
privacy.s4p2: The user is responsible for their use of the platform, compliance with applicable data protection regulations with respect to their own customers, and the content of messages sent through the service.
privacy.s5p1: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from its interpretation or fulfilment, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the Courts and Tribunals of Spain.
privacy.s6_purposeV: Provision of the ReseñasYa service and management of the contractual relationship
privacy.s6_authV: Agencia Española de Protección de Datos (AEPD) — www.aepd.es
privacy.s7intro: Depending on the type of user and the relationship with the platform, we process the following categories of data:
privacy.s7_1l0: Registration data: email address and encrypted password.
privacy.s7_1l1: Business profile data: business name, description, website URL, Google Maps link and selected communication tone.
privacy.s7_1l2: Usage data: activity logs, number of requests sent, customer satisfaction metrics.
privacy.s7_1l3: Billing data: for paid plans, data required for invoicing (name, tax ID, billing address). Payment data is managed directly by the payment processor and is not stored by {company}.
privacy.s7_2intro: Businesses using ReseñasYa enter their own customers' data (name and phone number) for sending review requests. Regarding this data:
privacy.s7_2l0: {company} acts as a data processor on behalf of the business user, who is the data controller.
privacy.s7_2l1: The business is responsible for having obtained the necessary consent from its customers before entering their data into the platform.
privacy.s7_2l2: Customer responses (free text) are processed by Anthropic's AI (Claude) for sentiment analysis and stored in association with each request.
privacy.s8Title: 8. Purposes and legal bases of processing
privacy.s8_r0p: Management of registration and platform access
privacy.s8_r1p: Provision of the WhatsApp messaging and sentiment analysis service
privacy.s8_r2p: Billing and compliance with tax obligations
privacy.s8_r2b: Compliance with a legal obligation (Art. 6.1.c GDPR)
privacy.s8_r3p: Sending service communications (updates, changes to terms)
privacy.s8_r3b: Legitimate interest of the controller (Art. 6.1.f GDPR)
privacy.s8_r4p: Sending commercial communications and newsletter (if accepted by the user)
privacy.s8_r5b: Legitimate interest of the controller (Art. 6.1.f GDPR)
privacy.s9intro: For the provision of the service, {company} shares data with the following providers acting as data processors:
privacy.s9footer: We do not share personal data with third parties outside the provision of the service, unless legally required.
privacy.s10l0: Account and business profile data: for the duration of the service contract and, once terminated, for the applicable legal limitation periods (minimum 5 years for commercial and tax obligations).
privacy.s10l1: End customer data (review requests): for the duration of the business account and up to 3 years after cancellation, unless an earlier deletion request is made.
privacy.s10l3: Billing data: 5 years in accordance with applicable tax regulations.
privacy.s11intro: Under the GDPR, data subjects may exercise the following rights by sending a request to {email} indicating the right they wish to exercise and attaching a copy of their identity document:
privacy.s11_r0desc: Find out what personal data we process about you.
privacy.s11_r2desc: Request the deletion of your data where applicable.
privacy.s11_r3desc: Request a temporary suspension of processing.
privacy.s11_r4desc: Object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.s11_r5desc: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.s11_r6desc: Withdraw consent given at any time without retroactive effect.
privacy.s11_r7desc: Lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (www.aepd.es).
privacy.s11footer: We will respond to your request within a maximum of one month, extendable by two additional months in complex cases, informing you of the extension within one month of receipt.
privacy.s12intro: {company} applies appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against accidental loss, unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration or destruction. These measures include:
privacy.s12l0: Encryption of data in transit via TLS/HTTPS in all communications.
privacy.s12l1: Password encryption using secure hash algorithms (bcrypt).
privacy.s12l2: Access control based on Row Level Security (RLS) in the database.
privacy.s12l3: Separation of access credentials by environment (development/production).
privacy.s12l4: Periodic rotation of API keys and access tokens.
privacy.s12p2: In the event of a security breach affecting personal data, {company} will notify the AEPD within a maximum of 72 hours and, where appropriate, the affected data subjects.
privacy.s13p1: {company} reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy to adapt it to regulatory, case-law or service changes. Substantial modifications will be communicated to registered users at least 15 days in advance by email or prominent notice on the platform.
privacy.s13p2: For any privacy queries, contact us at:

contact.title: Contact

contact.beforeWritingDesc: You may find the answer in our frequently asked questions section:
